BodyName: Committee on Sanitation and Solid Waste Management

Items.Title: A Local Law to amend the administrative code of the city of New York, in relation to organic waste recycling by city agencies
Items.MatterName: Organic waste recycling by city agencies.

Items.Title: Resolution calling on the New York State Legislature to pass, and the Governor to sign, S.5713/A.3249, to require the establishment of a composting program at dormitories, dining facilities, and other facilities owned, occupied, or operated by the State University of New York, the City University of New York, and institutions subject to their jurisdiction
Items.MatterName: Require the establishment of a composting program at dormitories, dining facilities, and other facilities owned, occupied, or operated. (S.5713/A.3249)
